risk_rationale: The FTC's updated endorsement guides introduce clarified requirements for disclosing material connections in influencer marketing, which may require adjustments to TikTok's existing policies on influencer disclosures.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Mandatory #ad labeling for influencer disclosure for minors.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Clarified disclosure requirements for endorsements, addressing the use of endorsements in social media and influencer marketing.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The updated FTC guides may require more detailed disclosure practices beyond the current #ad labeling, potentially affecting all influencer marketing, not just those involving minors.

remediations.title: Enhance Influencer Disclosure Practices
remediations.description: Update influencer marketing guidelines to ensure compliance with the FTC's clarified disclosure requirements. This may include additional training for influencers and more explicit disclosure formats.
acceptance_criteria: Updated guidelines are published and communicated to influencers.
Influencer marketing campaigns include enhanced disclosure formats.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the updated FTC guidelines could result in regulatory scrutiny and potential fines, impacting TikTok's reputation and financial standing in the US market.
recommended_actions: Review and update influencer marketing guidelines to align with FTC's updated endorsement guides.
Conduct training sessions for influencers on new disclosure requirements.
Implement monitoring mechanisms to ensure compliance with enhanced disclosure practices.
